nasb.text: Also the daughter of any priest, if she profanes herself by harlotry, she profanes her father; she shall be burned with fire.

esv.text: And the daughter of any priest, if she profanes herself by whoring, profanes her father; she shall be burned with fire.

cnv.text: 如果祭司的女兒羞辱自己去作妓女，就是羞辱了自己的父親；她必須用火燒死。

ccb.text: 如果有祭司的女儿做妓女，辱没自己，她就是辱没自己的父亲，必须烧死她。
